evidence_summary: Establish the physical and atmospheric decay of Helium through a three-day progression. The visual language must emphasize oxygen deprivation via lethargic movement, pallor, and labored breathing to communicate the scale of the planetary disaster.

Over three days, the atmosphere thins. The population suffers as oxygen levels drop. In the Helium palace, the royal family gathers in a sunken garden, physically weakened by asphyxiation, facing their impending deaths.
Characters appearing lethargic and pale amidst a thinning atmosphere.
A group facing impending death with fatalistic resignation.
The slow, labored physical decline of the royal family over three days.
